---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that AIB doesn't support yet?

## Proposed solution

How do you think this should work? API examples are welcome:

```python
# Example of how you'd like to use the feature
result = aib.new_feature(...)
```

## Which AIB component is this related to?

- [ ] Passport (identity, creation, verification)
- [ ] Translator (format conversion)
- [ ] Gateway (proxy, protocol detection)
- [ ] Policy engine (rules, guardrails)
- [ ] Federation (cross-org trust)
- [ ] Audit (receipts, Merkle proofs)
- [ ] SDK (Python or TypeScript)
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Other: ___

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, diagrams, references to similar features in other tools.
